_comments.sensitive_file_read: Prevent Claude from reading credentials, keys, or secrets from the filesystem — both project-local and home directory.
_comments.env_dump: Prevent commands that would print all environment variables to stdout, which may include secrets injected at runtime.
_comments.destructive_filesystem: Block irreversible filesystem operations. rm -rf and sudo can destroy the project or the host system.
_comments.git_safety: Block hard-to-reverse git operations: force-push rewrites remote history, reset --hard discards uncommitted work, clean -f deletes untracked files, branch -D removes branches without a merge check.
_comments.network_exfiltration: Block curl and wget in agentic context — they can exfiltrate data or pull and pipe remote scripts (curl … | bash). Package installs go through pip/npm directly.
_comments.accidental_publish: Prevent accidental release of packages or images to public registries. These actions are one-way and require explicit human intent.
